title: Datadog vs Postman
description: Compare Datadog vs Postman in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right developer tools tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Datadog emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.6/5 rating compared to 4.6/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, Datadog or Postman?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Datadog edges ahead with a 4.6/5 rating. Datadog excels at Datadog is a developer tools platform that helps DevOps Engineers and SRE Teams , while Postman is stronger for API development and testing platform for developers..

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Datadog and Postman?
faqs.answer: Datadog and Postman differ in pricing ($15/host/mo vs $14-39/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Datadog cheaper than Postman?
faqs.answer: Datadog starts at $15/host/mo while Postman starts at $14-39/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Datadog or Postman?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for developer tools. Datadog scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Datadog and Postman together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Datadog or Postman?
faqs.answer: Both Datadog and Postman prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which developer tools tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Postman for large teams, while Datadog may be more suitable for smaller teams with its $15/host/mo pricing.
